title: GMS Week 46 - PEAKING?!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 16/11/2021
Image reference: 2021-11-16_gms-week-46-peaking_img1.jpg
A few minor corrections were witnessed in the sub-continent markets this week, as fears start to emerge as to whether the markets have peaked yet or is there still some room for improvement in levels. In Turkey however, despite plate fundamentals being relatively unchanged and the Lira plummeting to new record-lows, vessel offerings have reportedly jumped significantly, by about USD 30/Ton this week. On the sub-continent end, Indian steel plate prices have collapsed in excess of USD 25/Ton over the course of the week, as the Alang market goes into a retreat.
